html:
Bone Shards are an item that used in several additional crafting recipes, including the Saddlehorn, Bucket-o-poop, the Rain Hat, the Rain Coat and the Eyebrella.

They are obtained by hammering Skeletons and Bones, destroying Tumbleweeds, destroying Hound Mounds, or as vomited gifts from friendly Catcoons.

Bone Shards are dropped after attempting to open the Loot Stash with the Deer Antler, causing Klaus and his two Gem Deer to spawn. Killing a No-Eyed Deer with an Antler has a 50% probability to drop a Bone Shard. Hammering Sea Bones will drop two Bone Shards with a 50% probability for an additional third Bone Shard to drop. In addition, hammering a Spoiled Fish and a Spoiled Fish Morsel will result in a 100% and 50% chance of dropping Bone Shards, respectively. Using Deconstruction Staff on Bone Helm and Bone Armor will yield 10 Bone Shards. Boulderboughs planted in certain biomes drop up to 5 bone shards after being cut with an Axe.

Additionally, Bone Shards can be crafted by Wilson if he has unlocked Transmute Icky III in his Skill Tree. It requires 2 Hound's Teeth to be crafted in this way. Wilson with said Skill can also use 2 Bone Shards to craft 1 Hound's Tooth.

Trivia

  • Bone Shards were first introduced in the Reign of Giants DLC. In the Quality of Life update, they were retroactively added to the base game.

Gallery

  • Bone Shards as seen in the poster for A Little Rain Must Fall update.
ResourcesCraftable Items

“Bits of bone.”
–Wilson
“I don't think they make good tinder.”
–Willow
“Wolfgang crush into even smaller bones!”
–Wolfgang
“Choking hazard.”
–Wendy
“PIECES OF STRUCTURAL SUPPORT SYSTEM”
–WX-78
“Remnants of a life well lived.”
–Wickerbottom
“I wish I knew how to make bread.”
–Woodie
“Grind them bones.”
–Maxwell
“Dense and sharp! Quite optimal for weapon crafting.”
–Wagstaff
“Bits öf my enemies.”
–Wigfrid
“Boney bits.”
–Webber
“I don't think a cast will help now.”
–Walani
“I could make a hearty stock with these.”
–Warly
“Bits o'bone.”
–Woodlegs
“IT DOTH POINTY PARTS”
–Wilba
“Sharp. Ouch!”
–Wormwood
“Who knew bone shards would be so useful?”
–Wheeler
“Whew. These got crunched real good.”
–Winona
“Fragmented, like my thoughts!”
–Wortox
“Piece of something dead.”
–Wurt
“It's a bone!”
–Walter
“Whatever these bones belonged to is lost to time.”
–Wanda
Bone Shards are an item that used in several additional crafting recipes, including the Saddlehorn, Bucket-o-poop, the Rain Hat, the Rain Coat and the Eyebrella.
They are obtained by hammering Skeletons and Bones, destroying Tumbleweeds, destroying Hound Mounds, or as vomited gifts from friendly Catcoons.
Bone Shards are dropped after attempting to open the Loot Stash with the Deer Antler, causing Klaus and his two Gem Deer to spawn. Killing a No-Eyed Deer with an Antler has a 50% probability to drop a Bone Shard. Hammering Sea Bones will drop two Bone Shards with a 50% probability for an additional third Bone Shard to drop. In addition, hammering a Spoiled Fish and a Spoiled Fish Morsel will result in a 100% and 50% chance of dropping Bone Shards, respectively. Using Deconstruction Staff on Bone Helm and Bone Armor will yield 10 Bone Shards. Boulderboughs planted in certain biomes drop up to 5 bone shards after being cut with an Axe.
Additionally, Bone Shards can be crafted by Wilson if he has unlocked Transmute Icky III in his Skill Tree. It requires 2 Hound's Teeth to be crafted in this way. Wilson with said Skill can also use 2 Bone Shards to craft 1 Hound's Tooth.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Mảnh Xương là một vật phẩm được sử dụng trong một số công thức chế tạo bổ sung, bao gồm Saddlehorn, Bucket-o-poop, Mũ Đi Mưa, Áo Mưa và Eyebrella.
